# Security Policy

## Supported versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 1.x (wire protocol v1) | Yes |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/VibranceFlow/VibranceFlow-core/issues) with a clear description and reproduction steps.

**Do not** include real Fernet keys, PIN codes, or `pairing.json` contents in public reports.

Full threat model and data handling: [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) in the repository root.
